name: taudit-azure-devops-extension
description: Azure DevOps Marketplace packaging for taudit pipeline policy gates, scans, and authority graph artifacts.

scripts.package:vsix: npm run prepare:task-runtime && mkdir -p dist && npx tfx-cli extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path dist
scripts.preflight: npm run check && npm run test && npm run package:vsix && npm run smoke:vsix
